main.description: Whole-account notification management for a designated *manager* app (see MANAGEMENT-AUTH.md). One envelope over every account-management operation `web/` performs — grants, pending, channels, devices, settings, routing, inbox. Requires `full` capability for (user, app): the app must be a relay-wide manager or per-user designated. The app authenticates with its service-auth bearer; the user is identified by a body `userToken` (dual-auth) or, for a standing designation, a vouched `did` (e.g. lite-session users). `method` selects the operation and `params` carries its arguments; `result` is that operation's output.

method.description: Operation name, e.g. 'listGrants', 'grant', 'revoke', 'getSettings', 'updateSettings', 'setDefaultRoute'. See MANAGEMENT-AUTH.md's per-method table.

userToken.description: A user-issued service-auth JWT (aud = relay, lxm = pub.atmo.notify.manage) — dual-auth. Omit to vouch via `did` (only honored for a designated manager).

did.description: The user being managed, when vouching (no userToken). Ignored if userToken is present (the user is taken from the token).

params.description: Arguments for `method` (shape depends on the operation).

result.description: The selected operation's return value (absent for void operations).
